title: RBI revokes Certificate of Registration of 150 NBFCs
description: <cite index="6-1">The RBI has revoked the Certificate of Registration of 150 Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs), with the largest share of cancellations involving firms based in Delhi and West Bengal.</cite> <cite index="6-7">The cancellations cover several small and medium-sized finance and investment firms involved in activities such as lending, leasing, investments, and other related financial services.</cite>
